titleStmt.title: SII 26.352: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 352. (A.R. No. 333 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a nandā lamp to the god of the temple of Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiya nāyaṉār of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr and an endowment of 30 Paḻaṅkāśu by Pichchaṉ Maṉṟulā Vēḷāṉ of Kuṟumuḍi. Several Śivabrāhmaṇas whose names are specified had received the amount and had agreed to burn the lamp perpetually in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvicaiyakaṇṭakopālatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku kuṟumuṭipiccaṉ maṉṟuḷā veḷāṉ pakkal Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇaṉ gautamaṉ tavarācarācapaṭṭaṉ ceṉṉeṟpeṟṟāṉum gau
tamaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷai makaṉ poṉṉampalakkūttapaṭṭaṉum gautamaṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Ulakāvuṭaiyāṉum tampimārum kācivaṉ tevarāṉa poṟkoyil nampi comatevapaṭṭaṉum Ivvāṇṭai Āvaṇi mātamutal Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirunantā viḷakkukku nāṅkaḷ Erikka kai
kkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu muppatu Ippaḻaṅkācu muppatukkum Oru tirunantāviḷakku ApoRead— aho •rāttiram cantirātittavarai Erippatākap poliyūṭṭākak kaikkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku tavarācarācapaṭṭaṉ ceṉṉalpeṟṟāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Uṭaiyapiḷḷai makaṉ poṉṉampalakkūttapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉapaṭṭaṉ Ulakāvuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai poṟ(r)koyilnampi comatevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ūr pirāmaṇaṉ Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ paṭṭaṉ ceyyapākamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiyākacamuttira pirāmārāyareṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyiṟ pāracivaṉ Aṟamvaḷattāṉ kāriyāḻvāṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 26.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
